titleStmt.title: SII 29.128: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 128. (A.R. No. B. 499 of 1961-62.) ŚRINGĒRI, SRINGERI TALUK, CHICKMAGALUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab near the western side of the Ānjanēya temple (behind the Vidyāśankara temple.)
This is a very important inscription from the point of both the history of Vijayanagara empire and the maṭha of Śringeri.

It records a grant of nine villages (named) of Kela-nāḍu situated with in Sāntaḷige-nādu after deducting 150 gadyāṇa towards taxes payable by the cultivators within, by the king Śrī Vīra-Hariyapoḍeya and his brothers Kampaṇṇoḍeya, Bukkaṇṇoḍeya, Mārapoḍeya, Muddapoḍeya, son-in-law Ballappa-daṁṇāyaka and kumara Sōvaṇṇoḍeya to Śrī Bharatitīrtha Śripāda, his disciples and the forty Brahmin attendants.

It also registers a grant of Kela-nāḍu and Kaimaleya Hosaūru and Kanyana situated with in Sāntaḷige-nāḍu to the attendants of Śrī-Bharatitīrtha Śrīpāda by Vira Kikkayi-tāyi who is described as Pānḍya chakravarti. The record begins with salutations to the Vidyātīrtha. Lingōja, son of Chiṁna-Mallōja wrote this record.
The record is dated Śaka 1268, Pārthiva, Phālguṇa, ba. 1, Thursday corresponding to 1346 A.D., March 9, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī vē
dabhyā
sa
caturmmu
kha bra
hmā
ṁ śrī vidyātīrthāya guravē parasmaitējasē namaḥ . yasya nāṁgīkṛta snēhadaśāhāniḥ kadācana .
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
pūrvāpara samudrāṁtāṁ jitvāhariharō bhavaṁ . jayōtsavaṁ khyāpayitu makarōddharma mu
ttamaṁ . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1268 neya pārthiva saṁvatsarada phālguna ba 1
guruvāradaṁdu svasti śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa
śrī vīrahariyapoḍeyaru kaṁpaṁṇnoḍeyaru bukaṁṇnoḍeyaru mārapoḍeyaru mudda
poḍeyaru Aḷiya ballappa daṁṇāyakaru kumāra sōvaṁṇnoḍeyaru mukhya . yivo
ḷagādavaru bhāratī tīrththaśrīpādaṁgaḷū Avara siṣyādigaḷū Ā siṁgēriya tīrththa vāsadalu
Anuṣṭānava māḍikoṁḍihadakke Ā paricārakarāgi māḍuva brāhmaru nālvattakke koṭṭa śilā
śāsanada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe sā(ṁ)taḷige nāḍoḷagaṇa kelanāḍiṁge saluva haḷiya vivara he
ddase . hoṁna hoḷe . babbi . haravari . beḷḷūru . Aṁbalūru . beḷaṁdūru . haḷaka .
kayimaleya hosaūru . Aṁntu Ūru voṁbhattu voḷagāda Adaṟa kāluvaḷisa
hitavaha . Ā kelanāḍanū Ā sā(ṁ)taḷige nāḍoḷagaṇa kuḷake ga 150 nū kaḍidu
Iṁnu Ā kelanāḍiṁge saluva catussīmeyoḷage Uḷḷa gadde beddalu Ēnuḷḷa suva
rṇnāya bhattāya Aṣṭa bhōga tēja sāṁmya pūrvāya . Apūrvāya . hiṁdehu
ṭṭida Apūrvāya muṁde huṭuva Apūrvvāya Ēnuḷadakkevū Ā kelanāḍa
modala siddāya nūṟaAivattakke . vuṁbaḷi . dēvāsa . khaṁḍike . daṁḍige . vuḍu
goṟe . matte Ēnuḷḷadakkevū śelavāgi Aivattu hoṁnanuḷidu . modala ku
ḷaga 1000 I gadyāṇaṁ nūṟanū Ā baḷi sahitavāgi Ā sā(ṁ)taḷige nāḍa mēlu bā
gi sāviradoḷage Ā kelanāḍiṁge Aivattaṟa kuḷavanū kaḍidu . Ā bhāra
tī tīrtha śrīpādaṁgaḷigevū . Avara śiṣyādigaḷigevū . Āparicārakarāgi māḍuva Ā
nālvattu prajege svarūciIṁ voḍaṁbaṭṭu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi māḍi koṭṭevāgi Ā sā(ṁ) taḷige
nāḍa mēlubhāgi sāviradoḷagevū kuḷavanu kaḍidevu . kaḍidu Ā kelanāḍanū Idha
rmmakke Ācaṁdrārkka sthāiyāgi naḍavaṁttāgi Ā bhāratītīrththa śrīpādaṁgaḷa Ā śiṣyādi
gaḷa Ā paricārakarige Ā hariyappoḍeyaru kaṁpaṁṇnoḍeyaru . bakaṁṇnoḍe
yaru . mārappoḍeyaru . muddappoḍeyaru . Aḷiya ballappa daṁṇnāykaru . kumāra sō
vaṁṇnoḍeyaru koṭṭa śilāśāsana śrī . nyūnākṣaramadhikākṣaraṁ vātatsarvvaṁ pramāṇamiti .
ṁ svasti śrī matpāṁḍya cakravartti Arirāya basavaśaṁkara rāya gajāṁkuśa . śrī vīrakikkāyitāyi
gaḷu sāṁtaḷige nāḍoḷagaṇa mēlubhāgadaluḷḷa kelanāḍanū kaimaleya hosavūra kanyāne
gūḍi bhāratītīrtha śrīpādaṁgaḷa paricārakarige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭarū . śrī .
sāmānyoyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārththi
vēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasyatadāphalaṁ
tasyāhaṁkāralagnōsmi mayādattaṁ prapālaya . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śatrūrēvahi śatru syāddharmmaḥ śatrurna kasyacit . śatru ṇāpi kṛ
tō dharmmaḥ pālanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvarggama
mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷamahāśrī . yiśāsanava baradavanu ciṁna
mallōjana maganu liṁgōjanu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
